nodes.label: DermCalc Android Application
nodes.rationale: Android app for dermatological score calculation and patient management, built with Jetpack Compose, Kotlin, Material3. Entry point: MainActivity detects orientation and delegates to portrait/landscape activities.

motifs: small pixel first-aid kit (bottom left corner)
nodes.composition: portrait orientation; dark central void framed by pixel-art medical/skeletal motifs at edges and corners; sparkle stars scattered throughout
nodes.notes: Medical pixel art aesthetic consistent with a dermatology calculator app; dark variant uses near-black background with gold accent motifs

nodes.label: ic_launcher — Standard Rounded-Square Variant
nodes.description: Standard Android adaptive launcher icon with rounded-square (squircle) shape. Pale blue background, dark red heart with white ECG pulse line. Available at hdpi, mdpi, xhdpi, xxhdpi, xxxhdpi densities.

nodes.label: HDPI Density Icons
nodes.description: Set of launcher icons at hdpi density (~72x72dp): ic_launcher.webp, ic_launcher_foreground.webp, ic_launcher_round.webp

nodes.label: ic_launcher_foreground — Foreground Layer Variant
nodes.description: Foreground layer of the adaptive icon, showing the heart+ECG motif on a light blue rounded-square background with visible padding/safe zone. Used as the adaptive icon foreground layer. Larger visible safe area than the composed icon. Available at hdpi, mdpi, xhdpi, xxhdpi, xxxhdpi densities.

nodes.label: ic_launcher_round — Circular Variant
nodes.description: Round/circular launcher icon variant. Same heart+ECG design on pale blue background, but rendered within a perfect circle rather than a squircle. Used on devices/launchers that display circular icons. Available at hdpi, mdpi, xhdpi, xxhdpi, xxxhdpi densities.

nodes.label: MDPI Density Icons
nodes.description: Set of launcher icons at mdpi density (~48x48dp): ic_launcher.webp, ic_launcher_foreground.webp, ic_launcher_round.webp

nodes.label: XXXHDPI Density Icons
nodes.description: Set of launcher icons at xxxhdpi density (~192x192dp, highest resolution): ic_launcher.webp, ic_launcher_foreground.webp, ic_launcher_round.webp

nodes.label: App Icon Core Design: Heart with ECG Line
nodes.description: Central visual motif: a deep crimson/dark red heart silhouette with a white ECG/heartbeat pulse line passing through it horizontally. The line extends as a flat red baseline on either side of the heart. Background is a soft pale blue (light sky blue). This is the shared design identity across all launcher icon variants and densities. Conveys medical/health theme despite the app being named DermCalc (dermatology calculator).
nodes.norm_label: app icon core design: heart with ecg line

nodes.label: Gradle Android Build
nodes.rationale: Version catalog only (libs.xxx from libs.versions.toml), FAIL_ON_PROJECT_REPOS enforces central repo management, non-transitive R class, JUnit 4 only. Android project built with Gradle wrapper.

nodes.label: Onboarding Flow
nodes.rationale: Multi-page pager for patient profile input (name, DOB, sex, height, weight). Gated by OnboardingModel.hasSeenOnboarding. All values stored in SI units; imperial converted on write.

nodes.label: PASI Score Calculator
nodes.rationale: Multi-step calculator across four districts (head, upper limbs, trunk, lower limbs) with erythema, induration, desquamation and area scoring. Severity: Mild <10, Moderate 10-20, Severe >=20.

nodes.label: EASI Score Calculator
nodes.rationale: Identical structure to PASI with adjusted parameters: erythema, oedema/papulation, excoriation, lichenification on 0-3 scale.

nodes.label: BMI Calculator
nodes.rationale: Weight/height input with automatic classification: underweight, normal, overweight, obese.

nodes.label: BSA Calculator
nodes.rationale: Body surface area via body region checklist: head, trunk, limbs, genitals.

nodes.label: Calculation History Log
nodes.rationale: Chronological log of all calculations with type, value, severity and date. In-memory only (Room dependency present, persistence not yet implemented). Full history screen with deletion when entries exceed 7.

nodes.label: Undertale-Inspired Theme Design
nodes.rationale: Custom Material3 theme with Undertale visual nods. Red heart icon (medical symbol and soul). Determination Mono typography. White border result cards (battle box aesthetic). Severity colors aligned with Undertale: mild=green, moderate=yellow, severe=red. Dark mode is intended experience; light mode for clinical environments.

nodes.label: GitHub Actions CI Pipeline
nodes.rationale: Five parallel jobs on push/PR to master: validate-wrapper, unit-test, instrumented-test (API 24+34 emulator matrix), dependency-check (OWASP, CVSS>=7.0 fails), lint. All except validate-wrapper depend on it.

nodes.label: Security Lint Rules
nodes.rationale: Seven lint rules at error severity: HardcodedDebugMode, SetWorldReadable, SetWorldWritable, UnsafeNativeCodeLocation, AllowBackup, ExportedReceiver, ExportedContentProvider. Pre-existing findings in lint-baseline.xml. OWASP dependency-check fails on CVSS >= 7.0.

nodes.label: Graphify Knowledge Graph Tool
nodes.rationale: Knowledge graph tool generating god nodes, community structure, cross-file relationships. Provides query/path/explain commands. Graph stored at graphify-out/. AST-only updates with 'graphify update .'.
